theme_and_archetype.description: A premium, tactile, and print-inspired interface. It blends the warmth of physical paper and old archives with the sharp precision of modern Swiss design. The core experience is realistic and physical, avoiding generic SaaS aesthetics.

rules.headings: Use font-serif for all major headings (H1, H2) to evoke a literary, editorial feel. Tightly track large headings (tracking-tight).
rules.body: Use font-sans for UI elements, labels, and body text to ensure extreme legibility and structural contrast against the serif.
rules.labels: Overlines and small UI labels must be uppercase, tiny (text-xs), and widely spaced (tracking-[0.2em]).

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Treat the screen like a physical gallery wall. Allow elements to breathe.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px borders (border-[#D1CEC7]) to separate sections organically, mimicking folded paper or architectural blueprints.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F0F0F] text-[#FAF9F6] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-sans text-sm tracking-wide hover:bg-[#C34A36] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0F0F0F] text-[#0F0F0F] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-sans text-sm tracking-wide hover:bg-[#E8E4DA] transition-colors duration-300

cards.default: bg-[#FAF9F6] border border-[#D1CEC7] p-6 md:p-8 rounded-none transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(15,15,15,0.04)]
cards.book_cover: relative aspect-[3/4] bg-white border border-[#D1CEC7] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(15,15,15,0.04)] overflow-hidden

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F2EFE9]/80 border-b border-[#D1CEC7]

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-[#D1CEC7] rounded-none px-0 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#0F0F0F] focus:ring-0 text-base font-sans

upload_dropzone.style: border-2 border-dashed border-[#D1CEC7] bg-[#FAF9F6] hover:bg-[#E8E4DA] transition-colors duration-300 p-20 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center cursor-pointer

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Subtle and tactile. Use slight Y-axis translations (-translate-y-1) and background color shifts.
motion_and_interaction.page_flip: MUST use 'react-pageflip' library. The flipbook component must feel physical. Ensure shadows update based on page turn progress. Add a subtle noise texture overlay to pages if possible to emulate paper.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use ease-out timing functions for smooth, grounded animations (e.g., transition-all duration-300 ease-out).

images.description: Scattered sheets of white paper covering the entire frame, use as a subtle multiply/blend background layer
Abstract art piece with geometric shapes, use as default cover for flipbooks
Minimal white object, use for 'No books created yet' empty state

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Install `react-pageflip` (npm install react-pageflip) for the core 3D page-curl engine.
PDF HANDLING: Use `pdfjs-dist` or `react-pdf` to parse PDF files into images/canvas BEFORE feeding them into `react-pageflip`. The pageflip component requires flat DOM nodes or images.
DRAG & DROP: Implement page reordering using `@dnd-kit/core` and `@dnd-kit/sortable` in the 'Manage Pages' view. Ensure it feels snappy.
STYLING OVERRIDES: Avoid standard Shadcn rounded corners (e.g., rounded-md). Override them to `rounded-none` to fit the print/editorial theme.
DATA-TESTID: ALL interactive elements (buttons, book covers, uploader, delete buttons) MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="upload-document-button"`).
FONTS: Import 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css.
NOISE TEXTURE: Add a CSS-based subtle noise or use the texture image provided with mix-blend-mode: multiply at 5% opacity over the app background to give it a physical feel.
